_meta.description: Catalog of Claude Code routines acting on FactoryFlowV2. Discovered from open-PR branch-name patterns + issue history; no account-level routine API is exposed to this run, so this catalog is inferred and should be confirmed by Austin.
_meta.discovery_method: PR head-branch slug clustering + issue references

routines.name: Palantir meta-routine (this routine)
routines.summary: Orchestrator-of-orchestrators. Fuses signals into docs/ontology/*, emits one daily digest, opens draft PRs only.

routines.name: Daily Codebase Engineer
routines.summary: TypeScript error reduction, security/CVE patches, dependency refresh, validation standardization.

routines.name: Three-Hat — Intelligence Analyst / Product Intelligence sweep
routines.summary: Regime-driven dashboard/procurement UX, cross-workspace FDR guidance, material->supplier intelligence.

routines.name: Three-Hat — Customer/Engineer safety sweep
routines.summary: Customer-facing safety gaps, crash/null-handling resilience, route guarding, lockfile sync.

routines.name: Daily digest state persistence
routines.summary: Persists daily routine digest state files.

routines.name: Weekly Deep Clean (Sunday)
routines.summary: Security headers, CVE patches, bundle split, docs sync, dead-code/route pruning.

routines.name: Dependabot
routines.class: B (dependency bumps; patch/minor auto-merge via workflow)
